dataset: Franklin D. Roosevelt Fireside Chat Archive

pi_items.source: Web search and direct URL access to https://archive.org/details/firesidechats_1705_librivox and https://archive.org/details/FdrFiresideChat_740
Web fetch of https://archive.org/details/firesidechats_1705_librivox confirms 31 individual Fireside Chat MP3 files available
Web fetch of https://archive.org/download/FdrFiresideChat_740 and https://archive.org/details/firesidechats_1705_librivox shows actual file sizes ranging from 4.9M to 20.0M

pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed metadata available for each recording: original title/topic, broadcast date (1933-1944), source URLs on archive.org, and filenames can be assigned
pi_items.source: Web fetches show each Fireside Chat has: numbered title (e.g., '01 - March 12, 1933'), broadcast date, and archive.org URL

pi_items.verified_value: Specification only - not a claim about external data
Specification only - not a claim about external data

privileged_info_summary: The Internet Archive (archive.org) hosts Franklin D. Roosevelt's Fireside Chats as real historical audio recordings from the FDR Presidential Library. 31 distinct Fireside Chat episodes are publicly available in multiple formats including VBR MP3 and 64kbps MP3. File sizes range from 4.9MB to 20.0MB, all exceeding the minimum requirement of 500KB. Each recording includes a broadcast date (1933-1944) and descriptive title. The LibriVox collection and individual FDR Fireside Chat collections on archive.org provide more than the required 3 distinct episodes for download.
